stemHtml: How can we use/insert a motorway intersection as a GNSS waypoint?

options.a: Add a motorway as a user waypoint using a bearing and distance from a GNSS waypoint.
options.b: GNSS waypoints are just for IFR flights.
options.c: We need to change our flight plan to IFR.
options.d: You can choose the motorway intersection as a waypoint since all motorway intersections are already GNSS waypoints.
